snippet.title: රාමා | ராமா | Rama  - A film by Ratta
snippet.description:
Production by Studio Ratta,
Concept/Direction/- Ratta
Suresh Eranda
Production Manager/ Art director - Sujendra Niro
DOP- Indika Lakmal
Edit - Oshada Ogee
Dubbing - Dilan Senanayake @AV rase
Music/ Mixed and Mastered - Ravi Royster

Cast - 
Dilan Senanayake as Rama
Sagarika Sugathapala as Lakshmi
Thejani Wijesinha as news anchor 
Dineth Sisiranga as Kamala
Sujendra Niro as the sailor 

Thugs
Mastha Roosa
Prabuddha Gayan
Yuresh Eranga
Dinayadura Shakila
Dimuthu Darshana
Arjuna Anu
Pradeep Sanjaya
Chathura Madushanka
Erandika Erabath
Chamil Asanka & family
Thusitha & family
Jass Perera

Voice
GK Reginold Eroshon as Rama
Danu as Lakshmi
Anthony Francis as Thugs
Prabudda Gayan as Thug
Sajee Rafeek as Thugs

Vikum Chathuranga

Makeup

Vehicles

snippet.title: Master - Vaathi Coming Video | Thalapathy Vijay | Anirudh Ravichander | Lokesh Kanagaraj
snippet.description:
மாஸ்டர் - வாத்தி கம்மிங் | தளபதி விஜய் | அனிருத் ரவிச்சந்தர் | லோகேஷ் கனகராஜ்

Make way for the extraordinary #ThalapathyKuthu! Our #VaathiComing right here from #Thalapathy's #Master! Loaded with the ultra-catchy rhythms and the Thara-local slang , listen to this #Anirudh dance number on loop! 

Watch the official Tamil song video here !

Stream Master Songs Now - https://SMI.lnk.to/MasterAlbum

Movie - Master
Song - Vaathi Coming
Composed by Anirudh Ravichander
Lyrics - Gana Balachandar
Vocals - Anirudh Ravichander & Gana Balachandar

Starring 
Vijay, Vijay Sethupathi
Malavika Mohanan, Arjun Das, Andrea, Shanthanu 

Written & Directed by Lokesh Kanagaraj
Dop - Sathyan Sooryan
Editor - Philomin Raj
Producer - Xavier Britto
Co-Producers - Lalit Kumar, Jagadish Palanisamy

snippet.title: මිලියන 20ක ආදරය දිනූ ෂුක්රා පළමු වරට හෙළි කළ අඳුරු අතීතය.| Lakshapathi - සිරස ලක්ෂපති ජයග්‍රාහිකාව
snippet.description:
🔺 මෙවර සිරස ලක්ෂපති වැඩසටහනේ මිලියන 2 ජයග්‍රහණය කළ ගාල්ලේ පදිංචි 17 හැවිරිදි වියේ පසුවන ෂුක්රා මුනව්වර් සමග නිව්ස්ෆස්ට් කළ විශේෂ කතා බහ..

🔺 Exclusive interview with the winner of Sirasa Lakshapathi, Shukra Munawwar, from Katugoda, Galle

02:25 ෂුක්රා ඔබේ නම හරියටම උච්චාරණය කරන්නේ කොහොමද? 
03:00 මිලියන 02 මිලියන 20ක් කියලා පැටලුණු හේතුව මෙන්න..
04:50 ලැප්ටොප් හීනය..
06:45 ගොඩක් අවස්ථාවල මම ප්‍රතික්ෂේප වීම්වලට ලකවුණු කෙනෙක්..
08:15 ලක්ෂපති මුලින්ම බලපු විදිය..
10:06 11 වසර වෙනකොට ෂුක්රා වෙනස් වුණා?
12:30 පොඩි කාලේ ඉදලම දුප්පත් ජීවිතයක් ගත කළේ..
13:30 මේ රටේ දුප්පත් දරුවන්ට තියෙන ලොකුම ප්‍රශ්නය ඔන්ලයින් අධ්‍යාපනය
16:00 අමු ඉරටුවලට ෂුක්රාගෙන් පණිවිඩයක්

Song Lyrics:
ඉනේ ගැටෙන දිග කොණ්ඩේ රටා අතුරලා
ලතාවකට ඇය එන්නේ දෙපා හොල්ලලා
සුදු බෝල මූණෙ ආලකම් බලා
ඇස් දෙක දුවන්නෙ නෑ ඉවත්වෙලා
දඟ කතා මල්ල
කනට මියුරු පැණි මතක් කලා
සුදු මුදු ඇඟිල්ලෙ මුදුව එල්ලලා
හදවතේ කෙල්ල සහෙට ගන්න ඕන ඉල්ලලා

ඔය රූ සොබා හද ඇතුලේ තබා
දොරඟුලු ලා දමා ගත්තා සෙවනැල්ලේ ඉඳලා
පසුපස බෝ දෙනා ආවත් පා සිනා
දොඩමලු වෙන්න එපා කෙල්ලේ මගෙ කොල්ලෝ කියාලා
සුදු බෝල මූණෙ ආලකම් බලා
ඇස් දෙක දුවන්නෙ නෑ ඉවත්වෙලා
දඟ කතා මල්ල
කනට මියුරු පැණි මතක් කලා
සුදු මුදු ඇඟිල්ලෙ මුදුව එල්ලලා
හදවතේ කෙල්ල සහෙට ගන්න ඕන ඉල්ලලා

හිඳිමූ සැපේ අපි දෙන්නා අපේ
ආදර ලොකයේ හැමදා සැනසිල්ලේ වැටිලා
දුක සංකා කැපේ ඔබ දකිනා හිතේ

snippet.title: Harith Wijeratne - Hemin Sare Piya Wida (හෙමින් සෑරේ) | Blind Auditions | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

#TheVoiceSL #SirasaTV #TheVoiceSriLanka #TheVoiceSL #TheVoiceLK #VoiceSriLanka #VoiceLK #lka

Song Lyrics: 
සීත පිණි බිංදු මන්දාරමේ
ඔබේ රුවින් මත් වෙලා..
පාට මල් අතර සිත්තම් කලේ..
ඔබේ රුවයි හිතෙනවා..

දෙවියන් ද මට දුන්නේ මේ ආදරේ ..
පන වාගෙ මං රකිනවා..
දිව්‍යාංගනා ඔබ ද මේ විශ්වයෙ..
මගෙ වෙන්න මටමම මැවූ..
නෙත් බන්දනා රූපෙ හිමිකරු ඔබේ..
මම නේද මියෙනා තුරූ..

සංසාරයේ පුරුදු බැල්මෙන් නුරා..
මගේ හිතම සුවපත් කලා..
ඇහිබැම්ම දේදුන්න සේ පායලා ..
මගෙ හිත් අහසෙ ඔබ ඉන්නවා ..
දෙවියන් ද මට දුන්නේ මේ ආදරේ ..පන වාගෙ මං රකිනවා

හදවතෙහි ඉඩ තියෙන අස්සක් පුරා ..
ඔබේ රූපෙ මිහිදන් වෙලා...
වෑහෙද්දි සුදු පාට කම්මුල් පුරා ...
මනමාලයි ඔබේ පෙම් හිනා
දෙවියන් ද මට දුන්නේ මේ ආදරේ ...
පනවාගෙ මං රකිනවා ...

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong – Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
 
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, “Godzilla vs. Kong,” the next epic adventure in Legendary’s cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in “Godzilla vs. Kong” as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titans—instigated by unseen forces—is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsgård (“Big Little Lies,” “The Little Drummer Girl”), Millie Bobby Brown (“Stranger Things”), Rebecca Hall (“Christine,” “Professor Marston and the Wonder Women”), Brian Tyree Henry (“Joker,” “Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse”), Shun Oguri (“Weathering with You”), Eiza González (“Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw”), Julian Dennison (“Deadpool 2”), with Kyle Chandler (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”) and Demián Bichir (“The Nun,” “The Hateful Eight”).
Wingard (“The Guest,” “You’re Next”) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (“Thor: Ragnarok”) and Max Borenstein (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters,” “Kong: Skull Island”), story by Terry Rossio (“Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales”) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), based on the character “Godzilla” owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The director’s behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (“The Mummy,” “World War Z”), production designers Owen Paterson (“Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,” “Godzilla”) and Thomas S. Hammock (“Blair Witch”), editor Josh Schaeffer (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), costume designer Ann Foley (“Skyscraper”) and visual effects supervisor John “DJ” DesJardin (upcoming “Zack Snyder’s Justice League”).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, “Godzilla vs. Kong.”  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

localized.title: Godzilla vs. Kong – Official Trailer
localized.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
 
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, “Godzilla vs. Kong,” the next epic adventure in Legendary’s cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in “Godzilla vs. Kong” as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titans—instigated by unseen forces—is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsgård (“Big Little Lies,” “The Little Drummer Girl”), Millie Bobby Brown (“Stranger Things”), Rebecca Hall (“Christine,” “Professor Marston and the Wonder Women”), Brian Tyree Henry (“Joker,” “Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse”), Shun Oguri (“Weathering with You”), Eiza González (“Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw”), Julian Dennison (“Deadpool 2”), with Kyle Chandler (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”) and Demián Bichir (“The Nun,” “The Hateful Eight”).
Wingard (“The Guest,” “You’re Next”) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (“Thor: Ragnarok”) and Max Borenstein (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters,” “Kong: Skull Island”), story by Terry Rossio (“Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales”) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), based on the character “Godzilla” owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The director’s behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (“The Mummy,” “World War Z”), production designers Owen Paterson (“Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,” “Godzilla”) and Thomas S. Hammock (“Blair Witch”), editor Josh Schaeffer (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), costume designer Ann Foley (“Skyscraper”) and visual effects supervisor John “DJ” DesJardin (upcoming “Zack Snyder’s Justice League”).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, “Godzilla vs. Kong.”  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

snippet.description:

☎Mobitel - 74740484
☎Hutch - 369415134
☎Airtel - 8880086729

▶Song Name : Amuthuma Malak
▶Artist : #SandunPerera
▶Lyrics : Lasitha Jayaneththi Arachchige
▶Music : Dilshan L Silva
▶Video Director : Charuka Dushyantha
▶Production: Evoke Music
▶Instruments 
 Esraj - Sujeewa Ranasinghe
 Saxophone - Geeth Peramuna 
 Flute - Chamith Heshan
▶Recording, Mix & Mastered - Dilshan L Silva @Sa-One Entertainment

ආයු කාලේ නිමා වෙන්නට කලියෙන් ගෙන ආව
කවුරු කවුරුත් වෙහෙස වෙන්නේ අරමුණු වෙත යන්න
හොඳම කාලේ ගෙවී යනකොට ජීවිතයේ තියෙන
මගේ ලෝකේ රිදුණු තැන් වල වැඩිපුර හිටියෙ නුඹ

අමුතුම මලක් වාගෙ ලස්සනක් දැක්කෙ මං  ඔබ ගාවයි
ඒ සුන්දරත්වයට පැල්ලමක් එකතු වෙයි හරි ලෝබයි
ඔය අත් දෙකෙන් දුන්න ආදරේ රහට නම් තව ආසයි
හිත නිස්කලංකවම පැත්තකට වෙන්න දැන් අවස්ථාවයි

මෙන්න කියා පෙන්නුවත් හිතේ යට තියෙනා දේ මිනිසුන්ගේ
දන්න කෙනෙක් කොහෙවත් නෑ හරියට පොතේ පතේවත් නැහැනේ
සතුටයි සහ කඳුලයි මැද ඇත්තේ නූලක වෙනසයි

පින්න වැටී දිස්නයක් ගෙනාවට ඉර දැක්කම හැංගේවී
ඉන්න හිතපු අය ලඟින් ඉන්නවද යන්න හිතෙනකොට යාවී
ඔබවයි සහ මාවයි මේ සොබාදහමටත් මතකයි

▶ Evoke Music
Enjoy & stay connected with us for more Videos!!!
👉Subscribe Evoke Music: http://goo.gl/MQ9Sbs
👉Like us on Facebook : https://bit.ly/EvokeMusic_FB
👉Follow us on Instagram: https://bit.ly/EvokeMusic_IG

දන්න කෙනෙක් කොහෙවත් නෑ හරියට පොතේ පතේවත් නැහැනේ
සතුටයි සහ කඳුලයි මැද ඇත්තේ නූලක වෙනසයි

පින්න වැටී දිස්නයක් ගෙනාවට ඉර දැක්කම හැංගේවී
ඉන්න හිතපු අය ලඟින් ඉන්නවද යන්න හිතෙනකොට යාවී
ඔබවයි සහ මාවයි මේ සොබාදහමටත් මතකයි

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn’t an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone’s favorite activity, but it can be very messy — and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one’s outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won’t take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 — The pacifier hack 

2:42 — A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 — The getting along/best friends’ shirt 

7:20 — Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 — Tasty gummy bear lollies

snippet.title: විදේශගත ලාංකික කතක් ගෝඨාගේ කලිසම ගලවයි
snippet.description:
https://lrnews.ch/
https://www.facebook.com/d.m.thushara.jayarathna.3
Im D.M. Thushara Jayarathna and studied at Ananda Sastralaya, Kotte. Im working as an Investigative Web Journalist For my higher studies, I joined with Sabaragamuwa University, Management Faculty as a management student and after that I joined to Sri Lanka Law College as a Law student. I have won the Gold medal addressing Juri competition and as well as I was the Captain of Law College Debating Team. 
 
I'm the one who made complain against Mr. Namal Rajapaksha, son of former president Mr. Mahinda Rajapaksha regarding cheating the Law College Examination. After that incident, I faced political problems and life threats. Due to this reason, In the year of 2012 I left my country and currently I'm living in Switzealand. 
 
 
I dedicated my life to establish Democracy and Rule of Law of my country.

දැන් සතුටින් යන්න
හුස්ම කෑ ගසයි හදේ නවතින්න
කාටත් නොපෙනෙන්න
මතක තියාගන්න
මම නැති දිනක හිනාවෙන්න

මගෙ විතරක් වෙන්න
සත්තමයි මැරුණත් මගෙ පපුව
තුල තිබූ ප්‍රේමය ඔබ සතුව

ලෝකයක් නෑ මට ඔබ නැතුව..//

ස්‍තුතියි ඔය අතින්
පාර කැපුවට මට විඳවන්න
දැන් හතියි ජීවිතේ
කාලෙ හරි හුස්මට සමුදෙන්න

මම නැති දිනක හිනාවෙන්න
මින් මතු ඉපදෙන්න
මගෙ විතරක් වෙන්න
සත්තමයි මැරුණත් මගෙ පපුව
තුල තිබූ ප්‍රේමය ඔබ සතුව
තියේවි නොවෙනස්ව
ලෝකයක් නෑ මට ඔබ නැතුව

ඔය මුවේ සිනහවයි
හදවතින් හැමදා පැතුවේම
තරහ නෑ මගෙ නෙතින්
කඳුලු ගත්තට හැම මොහොතේම
මතක තියාගන්න
මම නැති දිනක හිනාවෙන්න
මින් මතු ඉපදෙන්න
මගෙ විතරක් වෙන්න
සත්තමයි මැරුණත් මගෙ පපුව
තුල තිබූ ප්‍රේමය ඔබ සතුව
 තියේවි නොවෙනස්ව

snippet.description:
#VadiveluNonStopComedyHD #Manivannan #CheenaThaana001 #CheenaThaana007 #ManivannanMovieComedyVideoHD #PrasanaMovieComedyVideoHD

#VadiveluComedy எவளோ நேக்கா கொத்து விட்டுபோய்ட்டான், மனுஷனுக்கு புது புது வியாதியா வருதே நா என்ன பண்ணுவேன் | Best Comedy Video HD| CheenaThaana

Cheena Thaana 001 is a 2007 Tamil action comedy film starring Prasanna and Sheela. It's a remake of the 2003 Malayalam action-comedy film, C.I.D. Moosa.

Plot
Tamizharasu (Prasanna) wants to become a cop, but the arrogant police officers Inspector Parameshwaran (Manivannan) and AC Gowrishankar (Riyaz Khan) ensure that he does not succeed. Meanwhile, he discovers a plot to assassinate the Governor (Visu) by the terrorist Gulshan Baba (Kazan Khan), and he complains it to Gowrishankar, but discovers that he is also a member of the plot. So he forms a detective agency and starts cracking the plot, and how he succeeds in it with the help of his father (Delhi Ganesh), his father's Friend (Ilavarasu) and, of course, with his friend Cheenichamy (Vadivelu), who is also a thief, forms the rest of the story.

Cast
Prasanna as Tamizharasu
Sheela as Priya
Vadivelu as Seenichamy
Manivannan as Inspector Parameshwaran
Delhi Ganesh as Head Constable Ezhumalai Tamizharasu's father
Ilavarasu as Tamizharasu's father's friend
Riyaz Khan as ACP Gowrishankar
Visu as Vishwanath Reddy, former High Court Judge current Governor of Tamil Nadu
Nizhalgal Ravi as Vijayaraghavan IPS, the Chennai City Police Commissioner
Shanthi Williams as Governor's wife
T. P. Gajendran as a Madman

MovieInfo:
Directed by T. P. Gajendran
Produced by Mid Valley
Story by Udayakrishna-Siby K. Thomas
Starring Prasanna
Sheela
Vadivelu
Livingston
Manivannan
Riyaz Khan
Delhi Ganesh
Music by Deva
Cinematography Raja Rajan
Edited by N. Ganesh
Production
company 
Mid Valley Entertainment
Release date 
7 September 2007

Lyrics:
ඈ ශෘංගාරෙන් මත්වීලා
ස්වර්ග රසේද මවා ගෙනල්ලා
හැඟුම් පුරෝලා
රෑ තුන් යාමේ රඟදේවී 
රාග කසාය මුවින් නොඉල්ලා
ඉඟිබිඟි පාලා
අවසානේ නොවෙයි මේ ඇරඹුමයි
මගේ පෙම් කතාවේ
ජීවත්වෙනතුරු මෙමා ඔබ නමින්
හුස්ම ගැහුනාවේ..//

මේ විශල් නිශායමේ සුපෙම් නුරාගයේ
ඒ දෙතොල් පුරා මැවී සියුම් නුරා රසේ
මා හදේ කපාටයේ නැඟී රතී සුවේ
සාදරෙන් කතා උනේ සුසුම් අපේ ප්‍රේමා ගින්නේ
සුරම්‍ය තුසීත හැඟුම් ගෙනා අනුරාවී

Rap
රසේ මතු කරන ඇගේ ලතාවන්
මගේ මනස තුල ඇඳෙයි රටාවන්
මලේ සුවඳ මත වශී උනා මං
අපේ කතාවේ ඔයා විලාසිතාව
රඟදේවී දෙතොල් මැද තනිවේවී
මත්‍ රස නෙත් අග මං පැටලේවී
මත් උන සිතුවිලි දැන් ගලාව්ඒවී
කලඹාවී සිත මගෙ අනුරාවී

සායමින් වැසූ ඇගේ කොපුල් තටාකයේ
පීනමින් සරාගයේ ලැබූ සුමෝහනේ
ප්‍රේමනීය සෘතුවේ හැමූ සරාලියේ
මේ වසන්තයයි අපේ විඳින්න එක්වෙන්න ජීවිතේ
සුරම්‍ය තුසීත හැඟුම් ගෙනා අනුරාවී

snippet.description:
#VadiveluNonStopComedyHD #CheenaThaana001 #CheenaThaana007 #ManivannanMovieComedyVideoHD #PrasanaMovieComedyVideoHD

#VadiveluComedy எவளோ நேக்கா கொத்து விட்டுபோய்ட்டான், மனுஷனுக்கு புது புது வியாதியா வருதே நா என்ன பண்ணுவேன் | Best Comedy Video HD| CheenaThaana

Cheena Thaana 001 is a 2007 Tamil action comedy film starring Prasanna and Sheela. It's a remake of the 2003 Malayalam action-comedy film, C.I.D. Moosa.

Plot
Tamizharasu (Prasanna) wants to become a cop, but the arrogant police officers Inspector Parameshwaran (Manivannan) and AC Gowrishankar (Riyaz Khan) ensure that he does not succeed. Meanwhile, he discovers a plot to assassinate the Governor (Visu) by the terrorist Gulshan Baba (Kazan Khan), and he complains it to Gowrishankar, but discovers that he is also a member of the plot. So he forms a detective agency and starts cracking the plot, and how he succeeds in it with the help of his father (Delhi Ganesh), his father's Friend (Ilavarasu) and, of course, with his friend Cheenichamy (Vadivelu), who is also a thief, forms the rest of the story.

Cast
Prasanna as Tamizharasu
Sheela as Priya
Vadivelu as Seenichamy
Manivannan as Inspector Parameshwaran
Delhi Ganesh as Head Constable Ezhumalai Tamizharasu's father
Ilavarasu as Tamizharasu's father's friend
Riyaz Khan as ACP Gowrishankar
Visu as Vishwanath Reddy, former High Court Judge current Governor of Tamil Nadu
Nizhalgal Ravi as Vijayaraghavan IPS, the Chennai City Police Commissioner
Shanthi Williams as Governor's wife
T. P. Gajendran as a Madman

MovieInfo:
Directed by T. P. Gajendran
Produced by Mid Valley
Story by Udayakrishna-Siby K. Thomas
Starring Prasanna
Sheela
Vadivelu
Livingston
Manivannan
Riyaz Khan
Delhi Ganesh
Music by Deva
Cinematography Raja Rajan
Edited by N. Ganesh
Production
company 
Mid Valley Entertainment
Release date 
7 September 2007

snippet.description:
අවදානය පිණිසයි .මෙම වැඩසටහන සම්පුර්ණ නරබා කමෙන්ට් කරන්න .කිසිම අයුරකින් ජොති හඩට සම කර නැත සුනෙත් නම් ඔහු ඔහු කියන්නෙත් එයමය.වැඩසටහන නරබා ඔහු ගැන කමෙන්ට් කරන්න අප නොව ඔබයි ඔහු ජොතිපාල ශුරින්ට සමකරන්නේ එය නවතා ඔහුට සුබ පතන්න......ස්තුතියි 
මෙ සියල්ල නැසිගිය HR ජොතිපාල ශුරින්ට උපහාර වේවා ..
ආයුබෝවන් මගේ රත්තරං යහලුවනේ .මම නීවේදක. චන්දන පලිහවඩන මේ මගේ නිල යුටියුබ් චැනල් එක .ඔබේ දක්ෂකම් රටට පෙන්වන්න අප සූදානම් කතාකරන්න .0785480772.

snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

snippet.title: 🤯 LATE COMEBACK DRAMA! | HIGHLIGHTS | Granada 3-5 Barça
snippet.description:
With just two minutes to play, Barça looked to be heading out of the cup when the blaugrana pressure finally paid off, the away side scoring two late goals to take the game into extra time. snippet.title: Pavithra Wanniarachchi transferred to IDH | MY TV SRI LANKA
snippet.description:
Health Minister Pavithra Wanniarachchi who was infected with Covid-19 has been transferred to the Infection Disease Hospital (IDH) in Angoda yesterday evening.

After being diagnosed with Covid-19, she was admitted to a treatment center in Hikkakaduwa.

snippet.title: Prithvi Akash - Dance Monkey | Blind Auditions | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

#TheVoiceSL #SirasaTV #TheVoiceSriLanka #TheVoiceSL #TheVoiceLK #VoiceSriLanka #VoiceLK #lka

snippet.title: මාතර ප්‍රදේශයෙන් වාර්තා වූ කඳුළු කතාව මෙන්න
snippet.description: 73 වැනි නිදහස් දිනය ඊයේ දිනට යෙදී තිබුනා,මේ කියන්නේනම් නිදහස් දිනය ගැන නෙමෙයි. නිදහස් දිනයේ ඇත්තම නිදහස ලැබූ සුරතෙලෙක් ගැන.බලන්නකෝ වීඩියෝව.ඔබෙත් ඇසට කඳුලක් උනාවී.

LIKE US ON FACEBOOK : https://www.facebook.com/Athavannews

FOLLOW US ON TWITTER : https://www.twitter.com/AthavanNews

Install Our ATHAVAN NEWS Android App : https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.asiamediaglobal.athavannews

About Athavan TV

Athavan TV (Tamil: ஆதவன் டிவி) is a 24 x 7 News channel in Tamil language which is rapidly growing into a most watched and most respected news channel both in Sri Lanka as well as among the Tamil diaspora. 

The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views. The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favor or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organization.

The channel’s strength has been its in-depth coverage coupled with the quality of international television production. Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on local, world, business and sports. It also offers a wide array of week end programs.

snippet.title: ක්‍රිකට් ක්‍රීඩාවේ අනාගතය කොයිබටද? | Satana | සටන | Sri Lanka Cricket 26.01.2021
snippet.description:
▶️ ක්‍රිකට් ක්‍රීඩාව වර්තමානයේ ඇද වැටී තත්ත්වය පිළිබඳ කළ සටන වැඩසටහන. 

✍️ හිටපු ටෙස්ට් ක්‍රිකට් නායකයින් වන බන්දුල වර්ණපුර, අර්ජුන රණතුංග, සනත් ජයසූරිය සහ හිටපු ටෙස්ට් ක්‍රීඩක අවිශ්ක ගුණවර්ධන සමග සටන.. 

🔺 පොඩියට පටන් ගත්තු ක්‍රිකට් අවුල මහා ප්‍රශ්නයක් වුණේ මෙහෙමයි.. 
🔺 දැන් ක්‍රිකට් ගහන්නේ තමන් ගොඩ යන්න, ඉස්සර ගැහුවේ රට ගොඩ දාන්න - සනත් ජයසූරිය 
🔺 කෝටි 2ක ජනතාව⁣ට අපි වගකියන්න ඕන - සනත් ජයසූරිය 
🔺 ගාල්ලෙදි ස්වීප්, රිවස් ස්වීප් ගහනවනම් ප්‍රශ්නයක් තියෙන්න ඕන. ඇයි අපිට ස්පිනර්ස්ලා නැද්ද? - සනත් ජයසූරිය 
🔺 අරවින්දව,සනත්ව දවස් 3ක් පුහුණු කරානම් අර එංගලන්තේ ස්පිනස්ලා දෙන්නට මැරෙනකන් ගහන්න තිබ්බා - අර්ජුන රණතුංග
🔺 කුසල් මෙන්ඩිස් දක්ෂ දරුවෙක්: ක්‍රිකට් ගහන්න ඕන Facebook එකේ් නෙමෙයි, ග්‍රවුන්ඩ් එකේ  - අර්ජුන රණතුංග  
🔺 ක්‍රිකට් පරිපාලනය භාර ගන්න කැමතියි..  - අර්ජුන රණතුංග  
🔺 දැන් ඉන්න ක්‍රීඩා ඇමති නාමල්ටත් ක්‍රිකට් හදන්න බැරිනම් කාටවත් හදන්න බෑ -  බන්දුල වර්ණපුර   
🔺 පළමු ඉනිම, දෙවැනි ඉනිම නිසා තරගාවලිය පරාජය වුණා කියන්න ඕනනම් කෝච් කෙනෙක් අවශ්‍ය නෑ. වගකීම භාරගන්න කෙනෙක් අවශ්‍යයි. - අවිශ්ක ගුණවර්ධන  
🔺 කොන්ටිටි එක වැඩි වෙලා කොලිටි එක නැතිවෙලා - අවිශ්ක ගුණවර්ධන

localized.title: ක්‍රිකට් ක්‍රීඩාවේ අනාගතය කොයිබටද? | Satana | සටන | Sri Lanka Cricket 26.01.2021
localized.description:
▶️ ක්‍රිකට් ක්‍රීඩාව වර්තමානයේ ඇද වැටී තත්ත්වය පිළිබඳ කළ සටන වැඩසටහන. 

✍️ හිටපු ටෙස්ට් ක්‍රිකට් නායකයින් වන බන්දුල වර්ණපුර, අර්ජුන රණතුංග, සනත් ජයසූරිය සහ හිටපු ටෙස්ට් ක්‍රීඩක අවිශ්ක ගුණවර්ධන සමග සටන.. 

🔺 පොඩියට පටන් ගත්තු ක්‍රිකට් අවුල මහා ප්‍රශ්නයක් වුණේ මෙහෙමයි.. 
🔺 දැන් ක්‍රිකට් ගහන්නේ තමන් ගොඩ යන්න, ඉස්සර ගැහුවේ රට ගොඩ දාන්න - සනත් ජයසූරිය 
🔺 කෝටි 2ක ජනතාව⁣ට අපි වගකියන්න ඕන - සනත් ජයසූරිය 
🔺 ගාල්ලෙදි ස්වීප්, රිවස් ස්වීප් ගහනවනම් ප්‍රශ්නයක් තියෙන්න ඕන. ඇයි අපිට ස්පිනර්ස්ලා නැද්ද? - සනත් ජයසූරිය 
🔺 අරවින්දව,සනත්ව දවස් 3ක් පුහුණු කරානම් අර එංගලන්තේ ස්පිනස්ලා දෙන්නට මැරෙනකන් ගහන්න තිබ්බා - අර්ජුන රණතුංග
🔺 කුසල් මෙන්ඩිස් දක්ෂ දරුවෙක්: ක්‍රිකට් ගහන්න ඕන Facebook එකේ් නෙමෙයි, ග්‍රවුන්ඩ් එකේ  - අර්ජුන රණතුංග  
🔺 ක්‍රිකට් පරිපාලනය භාර ගන්න කැමතියි..  - අර්ජුන රණතුංග  
🔺 දැන් ඉන්න ක්‍රීඩා ඇමති නාමල්ටත් ක්‍රිකට් හදන්න බැරිනම් කාටවත් හදන්න බෑ -  බන්දුල වර්ණපුර   
🔺 පළමු ඉනිම, දෙවැනි ඉනිම නිසා තරගාවලිය පරාජය වුණා කියන්න ඕනනම් කෝච් කෙනෙක් අවශ්‍ය නෑ. වගකීම භාරගන්න කෙනෙක් අවශ්‍යයි. - අවිශ්ක ගුණවර්ධන  
🔺 කොන්ටිටි එක වැඩි වෙලා කොලිටි එක නැතිවෙලා - අවිශ්ක ගුණවර්ධන

si.title: ක්‍රිකට් ක්‍රීඩාවේ අනාගතය කොයිබටද? | Satana | සටන | Sri Lanka Cricket 26.01.2021
si.description:
▶️ ක්‍රිකට් ක්‍රීඩාව වර්තමානයේ ඇද වැටී තත්ත්වය පිළිබඳ කළ සටන වැඩසටහන. 

✍️ හිටපු ටෙස්ට් ක්‍රිකට් නායකයින් වන බන්දුල වර්ණපුර, අර්ජුන රණතුංග, සනත් ජයසූරිය සහ හිටපු ටෙස්ට් ක්‍රීඩක අවිශ්ක ගුණවර්ධන සමග සටන.. 

🔺 පොඩියට පටන් ගත්තු ක්‍රිකට් අවුල මහා ප්‍රශ්නයක් වුණේ මෙහෙමයි.. 
🔺 දැන් ක්‍රිකට් ගහන්නේ තමන් ගොඩ යන්න, ඉස්සර ගැහුවේ රට ගොඩ දාන්න - සනත් ජයසූරිය 
🔺 කෝටි 2ක ජනතාව⁣ට අපි වගකියන්න ඕන - සනත් ජයසූරිය 
🔺 ගාල්ලෙදි ස්වීප්, රිවස් ස්වීප් ගහනවනම් ප්‍රශ්නයක් තියෙන්න ඕන. ඇයි අපිට ස්පිනර්ස්ලා නැද්ද? - සනත් ජයසූරිය 
🔺 අරවින්දව,සනත්ව දවස් 3ක් පුහුණු කරානම් අර එංගලන්තේ ස්පිනස්ලා දෙන්නට මැරෙනකන් ගහන්න තිබ්බා - අර්ජුන රණතුංග
🔺 කුසල් මෙන්ඩිස් දක්ෂ දරුවෙක්: ක්‍රිකට් ගහන්න ඕන Facebook එකේ් නෙමෙයි, ග්‍රවුන්ඩ් එකේ  - අර්ජුන රණතුංග  
🔺 ක්‍රිකට් පරිපාලනය භාර ගන්න කැමතියි..  - අර්ජුන රණතුංග  
🔺 දැන් ඉන්න ක්‍රීඩා ඇමති නාමල්ටත් ක්‍රිකට් හදන්න බැරිනම් කාටවත් හදන්න බෑ -  බන්දුල වර්ණපුර   
🔺 පළමු ඉනිම, දෙවැනි ඉනිම නිසා තරගාවලිය පරාජය වුණා කියන්න ඕනනම් කෝච් කෙනෙක් අවශ්‍ය නෑ. වගකීම භාරගන්න කෙනෙක් අවශ්‍යයි. - අවිශ්ක ගුණවර්ධන  
🔺 කොන්ටිටි එක වැඩි වෙලා කොලිටි එක නැතිවෙලා - අවිශ්ක ගුණවර්ධන

snippet.title: Hiking the Knife Edge 😱  Katusu Konda | TRIP PISSO VLOG #66
snippet.description:
Like us on FB :👉 https://www.facebook.com/trippisso
Follow us on Instagram :👉 https://www.instagram.com/trippisso
Backpack Partner : BagsPop.lk | +94702408080
GoPro Partner : Camera point  | +94773222445 / +94772242445

Knife Edge ( Katusu Konda | Hanthana, Sri Lanka )
________________________________________________
It is a strange experience for us to experience the beauty of the environment in an adventurous way. Walking on the “knife-edge” at the end of the Hanthana mountain range is also an adventurous experience. It is also known as Katusu Konda. It gets its name from the fact that it is a lofty peak with a narrow top like the backbone of a lizard. Looking down from here there is a very dangerous steep slope. If you stumble or fall, you will not be able to have faith in life.

If you are going to see this the easiest way is to go towards Peradeniya. You have to pass about 7km from Peradeniya to reach the Sarasawigama. You can take a bus until you reach the Sarasawigama. If you want to go beyond that you have to go on a three-wheeler or on foot. It’s another 4km from Sarasavigama to Upland. About 2km along the uphill road in front of the small temple and shop in Upland, you will find a few small houses. The footpath to the mountain is found only after you have gone through those small houses.

All you have to do is climb up one of these trails. It is a very tiring journey in the hot sun. Somehow, after completing this difficult journey and reaching the top of the mountain, the view is that all your fatigue is gone. Not only this, with the help of wind you can be fresh. From the top of the hill, you can see a 360 view of Kandy city, peacocks hills, Kabaragala, Alagalla, knuckles mountain range, and Hunnasgiriya. Also, next to the Katusu Konda is an Ura mountain. There is also a small natural cave at the top of the hill. If you want to explore the beauty of nature, then this is the place for you.


Our Camera Tools 👉  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1PkkhQpfiDs
Editing Tools : I Mac 21" , Final cut pro X, Photoshop CC

Audio Credits : 
1. Composer squad ( Paid music )
2. Hanthanata Payana Sanda (Instrumental)- Sitar And Piano Cover
    Link : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=91wUT0c4IsA
3. Hanthanata Payana Sanda ( cover ) - by Ashen Tharindra
    Link : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V_Rg_oCppP8
4. Dramatic Suspenseful Movie Trailer Music - Intense Epic Build Up
    Music by : Fesliyan Studios
    Link : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YtXpWTMgPbs

#katusu_konda #trip_pisso

snippet.title: 23 SMART LIFE HACKS FOR EVERY OCCASION
snippet.description:
Ways to make your life easier with these fantastic hacks. 

As we go through life, we come across little problems that seem unsolvable. But today, we’re going to show you some fun tricks you can try that will help save you time and hassle. Like when you have to sign a bunch of documents all at once. One way to fix that is to tape some pens on a piece of paper (Somewhat diagonally) and then use them to write. Now let’s head to the kitchen, where you need to make perfectly round crepes for your guests. You don’t need to buy an expensive crepe tool that flattens them out and turns them into a perfect circle — you just need a chopstick or a skewer instead. You break it in the middle, create a 90-degree angle, and voila. Did you know you can use an old highlighter to paint or write stuff down on your tablet? Watch the video to see how to do it. 

Timestamps: 
1:04 — Perfectly round crepes
2:02 — No cake plates? Try this hack 
3:09 — Avoid staining your shirt collar with this trick 
5:08 — DIY fake nose ring 
6:16 — A way to cut package tape 
8:12 — DIY compass using three pencils

This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

The following video might feature activity performed by our actors within controlled environment- please use judgment, care, and precaution if you plan to replicate.

snippet.title: India claim stunning series win, end Australia's Gabba streak | Vodafone Test Series 2020-21
snippet.description:
Rishabh Pant was the hero as an injury-ravaged India ended Australia's 32-year undefeated run at the Gabba, executing a record-breaking final day chase to win the Test by three wickets and the series 2-1.

snippet.title: සබීතා ගෝඨාගේ සිරියහනට
snippet.description:
https://lrnews.ch/
https://www.facebook.com/d.m.thushara.jayarathna.3
Im D.M. Thushara Jayarathna and studied at Ananda Sastralaya, Kotte. Im working as an Investigative Web Journalist For my higher studies, I joined with Sabaragamuwa University, Management Faculty as a management student and after that I joined to Sri Lanka Law College as a Law student. I have won the Gold medal addressing Juri competition and as well as I was the Captain of Law College Debating Team. 
 
I'm the one who made complain against Mr. Namal Rajapaksha, son of former president Mr. Mahinda Rajapaksha regarding cheating the Law College Examination. After that incident, I faced political problems and life threats. Due to this reason, In the year of 2012 I left my country and currently I'm living in Switzealand. 
 
 
I dedicated my life to establish Democracy and Rule of Law of my country.

snippet.title: My Home Tour | Welcome to Makapa home | Part 01 | Mr Makapa
snippet.description:
#MyHomeTour #WelcometoMakapahome #Housetour

After an exciting Ooty trip, Mr. Makapa takes you through his house. Would you like to go inside?

Actor Makapa Anand has won many Vijay TV awards. The awards and the trophies are the extraordinary achievements of his life.

He talks about his favorite memories with his daughter and actor Thalapathy Vijay. 

Makapa likes to travel. You can see the souvenirs of different countries he has visited. 

Makapa’s favorite spot is the terrace. He likes to sit in the backdrop of Bamboo trees. The city view looks astonishing from the top.

Actor Makapa likes to collect small things. Experience the joy of little things in this “My Home Tour” video. 

Also, subscribe to Mr. Makapa for more exciting videos.

snippet.title: 菌子——云南人的“本命菜”【滇西小哥】
snippet.description:
云南冬天虽然也有温暖如春的太阳，但是山里没有菌子，去和种菌子的叔叔要了几个菌包来，悉心照料几天就长出了可爱的菌子，格外鲜甜肥美，清炒，炖汤，油炸统统吃一遍！
云南人吃菌子的喜爱是无可替代的，不管是山上长的还是地里种的，都能变着花样的吃，而且总吃不腻～

※Click "cc" on the lower right menu to choose your subtitle language.

In winter, though the sun shines just like that in the spring, there's no fungus in the mountains. I asked for some fungus bags from a fungus farmer. After a few days, there grows some lovely fungi. These fungi are very sweet and tender. So I stir-fried, stewed and deep-fried them one by one.
Nothing beats Yunnan people's love for fungus. No matter they are found in mountains or harvested from fields, we are never tired of eating them in various ways.

localized.title: 菌子——云南人的“本命菜”【滇西小哥】
localized.description:
云南冬天虽然也有温暖如春的太阳，但是山里没有菌子，去和种菌子的叔叔要了几个菌包来，悉心照料几天就长出了可爱的菌子，格外鲜甜肥美，清炒，炖汤，油炸统统吃一遍！
云南人吃菌子的喜爱是无可替代的，不管是山上长的还是地里种的，都能变着花样的吃，而且总吃不腻～

bn.title: মাশরুম- ইউনানের মানুষের জন্য স্থানীয় কিন্তু সুস্বাদু প্রিয় রান্না
bn.description:
※মেনু বারের নীচের ডানদিকে কোণার সিসি বোতামটি ক্লিক করুন এবং সংশ্লিষ্ট ভাষায় সাবটাইটেল উপস্থিত হবে!

ইউনানে শীতকালে রোদ এবং গরম হলেও, পাহাড়ে কোন মাশরুম নেই। আমি আমার কাকাবাবুর থেকে শুধু কয়েক ব্যাগ মাশরুমের ব্যাগ চেয়েছিলাম যিনি গাছের বিষয়ে দক্ষ, যত্ন সহকারে কয়েক দিন দেখাশোনা করুন, আপনি সুন্দর দেখতে মাশরুম পেতে পারেন যা খুবই কোমল এবং মিষ্টি যেটা ভাঁজলে, সেলাই করলে, তেলে ভাঁজলে সুন্দর একটা স্বাদ আসে!

মাশরুমের প্রতি ভালোবাসা, হয় পাহাড়ে নিজেই হয় বা মাঠে লাগানো হয়, ইউনানের মানুষের জন্য এটি অপূরণীয়। তারা এটিকে বিভিন্ন রকমের কাজে লাগাবে, যা এটিকে একটা নতুন স্বাদ দেবে~

সবাইকে অভিবাদন! আমি ডায়ানজি জিয়াওজে, ইউনান প্রদেশের স্থানীয় এক মেয়ে, আপনি যদি আমার ভিডিও পছন্দ করেন তবে দয়া করে আমার চ্যানেলটি অনুসরণ করুন, আমি ইউনান্নে আমার জীবন এবং বিশেষ খাবারগুলি বিভিন্ন প্ল্যাটফর্মে শেয়ার করব, আমি আপনাকে প্রতিদিন সুখী করতে চাই এবং প্রতিদিন সুস্বাদু খাবার খাওয়া~

en.description:
※Click "cc" on the lower right menu to choose your subtitle language.

In winter, though the sun shines just like that in the spring, there's no fungus in the mountains. I asked for some fungus bags from a fungus farmer. After a few days, there grows some lovely fungi. These fungi are very sweet and tender. So I stir-fried, stewed and deep-fried them one by one.

id.title: Jamur – “Hidangan Istimewa” Orang Yunnan.
id.description:
※Tekan tombol pada menu di kanan bawah, maka akan muncul subtitle dengan bahasa yang sesuai!

Meskipun musim dingin di Yunnan juga ada matahari yang hangat seperti musim dingin, tetapi di gunung tidak ada jamur. Aku telah meminta beberapa jamur dari seorang paman pembudi daya jamur. Dalam beberapa hari, telah tumbuh jamur-jamur yang imut. Tampak segar dan indah. Ditumis, di godok dengan sup ataupun digoreng, semua dicicipi!

Kegemaran orang Yunnan makan jamur memang tidak bisa tergantikan. Tidak peduli apakah yang tumbuh di gunung atau yang ditanam di kebun, semuanya bisa dimakan dengan beraneka ragam cara, dan juga tidak membosankan.

Halo semuanya. Aku adalah Dianxi Xiaoge, seorang gadis khas Yunnan. Jika kalian menyukai videoku, silakan terus ikuti saluranku ini. Aku akan berbagi kehidupanku dan makanan lezat khas Yunnan di platform yang berbeda. Semoga kalian setiap hari berbahagia, dan setiap hari selalu ditemani makanan lezat~

hi.title: मशरूम-- युन्नान लोगों की "अपरिहार्य व्यंजन"
hi.description:
※नीचे दाऐ कोना मेनू बार में सीसी बटन पर क्लिक करें, तो संबंधित भाषा में उपशीर्षक दिखाई होगी। 

हालांकि युन्नान के सर्दियों में गर्म वसंत सूरज भी है, लेकिन पहाड़ों में कोई मशरूम नहीं है। जो मशरूम उगाते हैं, उस चाचा से मैंने कुछ प्लुरोटस ओस्ट्रीटस बैग लाया। कुछ दिनों की देखभाल  के बाद, प्यारे प्लुरोटस ओस्ट्रीटस बढे। काफी ताज़ा मिठा और स्वादिष्ट है। हलचल-तलना, स्टू और डीप फ्राई सब बनाकर खा लेते हैं। मशरूम खाने का युन्नान लोगों का प्यार अपूरणीय होता है। चाहे पहाड़ पर बढा हो या जमीन में उगाया गया हो, तो विभिन्न तरीकों से खाया जा सकता है। और कभी भी मशरूम खाने से नहीं थक रहा है। 

सभी को नमस्कार, मैं दिअन षि षीओग, युन्नान की एक असली छोटी बहन। अगर आपको मेरा वीडियो पसंद है तो मेरे चैनल को देखना जारी रखें। मैं विभिन्न प्लेटफार्मों पर अपने जीवन और युन्नान विशिष्टताओं को साझा करूं, मुझे ख्वाइश है कि आप हर दिन खुश रहें स्वादिष्ट भोजन के साथ ~

ko.title: 버섯——운남 사람의 “혼메이(本命) 요리”
ko.description:
※우측 상단 메뉴의 cc버튼을 클릭하시면 원하시는 언어의 자막이 나옵니다!

운남은 겨울에도 봄과 같이 따뜻하게 내리쬐는 태양이 있지만, 산에 버섯들이 자라지 않습니다. 버섯을 심으시는 아저씨에게 균표를 몇개 얻어왔는데요. 며칠동안 정성스럽게 키웠더니 귀여운 버섯이 자라났습니다. 그래서 그런지 더 향긋하고 더 맛있더라구요. 볶음, 찌개, 튀김 모든 방식으로 한 개씩 요리를 해먹었습니다. 
운남 사람들의 버섯 사랑은 그 무엇도 대체가 불가능합니다. 산에서 난 것이든 땅에 심은 것이든, 여러가지 방식으로 먹지만, 또 절대 질리지가 않죠~

여러분 안녕하세요! 저는 전서소가(뎬시샤오꺼) 운남 본토 아가씨 입니다. 제 영상이 마음에 드신다면 계속해서 제 채널을 구독해주세요.
저는 몇가지 플랫폼에서 제 일상과 운남 특색 미식들을 공유하고있습니다. 여러분 좋은하루되시고 매일 맛있는 음식과 함께하시길 바라겠습니다~

th.title: เห็ด - "อาหารโปรด" -- ชาวยูนนานชอบเป็นชีวิตจิตใจ
th.description:
※คลิกปุ่ม "คำบรรยาย" ที่แถบเมนูด้านล่างขวาเพื่อเลือกแสดงซับไตเติ้ลภาษาไทย

ในฤดูหนาวแม้ว่ามีแดดเช่นเดียวกับฤดูใบไม้ผลิ 
แต่บนภูเขาก็ไม่มีเห็ดให้เก็บ
ฉันจึงไปขอถุงเชื้อเห็ดจากคุณลุงที่เพาะเห็ด
ดูแลเพียงไม่กี่วันเชื้อก็ออกเป็นเห็ดที่สวยงาม
เห็ดเหล่านี้หวาน,นิ่ม,อวบ น่ากินมาก 
นำมาปรุงเป็นผัด, ตุ๋นและทอด
สำหรับชาวยูนนานแล้ว 
ความชอบเห็ดไม่มีอะไรมาแทนได้
ไม่ว่าจะเป็นเห็ดที่เก็บจากภูเขาหรือเห็ดที่เพาะเอง
เรานำมาทำเป็นอาหารได้หลากหลายรูปแบบ
 ~ กินได้ไม่มีเบื่อเลยค่ะ ! ~

สวัสดีค่ะ เพื่อน ๆ ทุกคน !
ฉันคือเตียนซี เสี่ยวเกอ (Dianxi Xiaoge-滇西小哥)
เป็นสาวชาวพื้นเมืองจากมณฑลยูนนาน ประเทศจีน
หากคุณชื่นชอบวิดีโอนี้กรุณากด "ติดตาม" ช่องของฉันด้วยค่ะ
ฉันจะได้นำเสนอเรื่องราวของฉันและอาหารตามแบบฉบับของยูนนาน มาแบ่งปันต่อไป
ขอให้คุณมีความสุขและเพลิดเพลินกับอาหารอร่อยทุก ๆ วันด้วยค่ะ

vi.title: Nấm  --- “món ăn bổn mạng” của người Vân Nam
vi.description:
※click chuột nhấn vào cc ở góc dưới bên phải màn hình, thì sẽ có bản sub tương ứng với ngôn ngữ của bạn xuất hiện rồi !

Mùa đông ở Vân Nam mặc dù cũng có mặt trời ấm áp như mùa xuân, nhưng ở trên rừng không có nấm, đi đến nhà chú trồng nấm để lấy mấy bao nấm về, chăm sóc cẩn thận vài ngày, cây nấm đáng yêu đã mọc ra rồi, bên ngoài tươi ngon mẫm, xào, hầm canh, chiên dầu đều ăn hết một lượt!
Sở thích ăn nấm của người Vân Nam là không thể nào thay thế được, không cần biết là mọc ở trên rừng hay trồng ở dưới đất, đều có thể làm thành rất nhiều cách để ăn, hơn nữa lại còn ăn không ngấy~

Chào các bạn! Tôi là Điền Tây tiểu ca, một cô gái  chính hiệu của tỉnh Vân Nam, nếu như các bạn thích video của tôi, có thể tiếp tục theo dõi trang của tôi, tôi sẽ chia sẻ cuộc sống của tôi ở các  trang,  và các món ăn đặc sắc của Vân Nam, chúc các bạn luôn luôn vui vẻ, ngày nào cũng có ẩm thực bầu bạn~

snippet.title: Harshi Anjumala : What's in My Bag | E33 | Bold & Beautiful
snippet.description:
Derana Little Stars වේදිකාවෙන් කලා දිවිය ආරම්භ කල පුංචි තරුව හර්ශි අංජුමාලා දෙරණ නාලිකාවෙ විකාශනය වන "සිදූ" හා ජාතික රූපවාහිනී නාලිකාවේ විකාශිත "සකල ගුරු" නාට්‍ය වලින් පුංචි තිරය හරහා ගොඩාක් ජනප්‍රියත්වයට පත්වුනා. ඒ වගෙම චිත්‍රපට ක්ෂෙත්‍රයට අත්පොත් තබා ඇති මේ සුරූපී පුංචි තාරකාව B&B- What's in My Bag segment එකට සම්බන්ද වුනේ පුංචිම පුංචි bag එකේ ගෙනියන දේවල් ගැන කතාකරන්න.

Location Provider : Land of Kings Café & Restaurant - Castle Black [https://www.instagram.com/land_of_kings_cafe_restaurant/]

Hair & Makeup : Nlima Dilukshi (dil ru) | ROPELRICH Salon - 0777426393
[377, Kandy rd, Mahara, Kadawatha.]

Production : IdeaHell

Subscribe to : https://goo.gl/Ym9F5f

snippet.title: WHOLE CAMEL!! Authentic Arabian Food Cooking - 1st time in Indian Youtube!! Irfan's view
snippet.description:
#Camel #Dubai #irfansview

When I thought of going to Dubai the first thing came into my mind is Camel. First time in Indian YouTube we are Cooking whole Camel worth over 1.5 lakhs. Eating camel meat when we visit Dubai is the usual thing but cooking whole camel in one stretch and giving feast to yourself would be the best of all. So I decided to buy a camel, slaughter it and cook it. I just wanted a native to cook it. So everything was set and the whole camel cooked by the native of Bedouin and I would like thank my friend who helped me throughout this plan. I just wanted to give you guys the best so I myself went to their farm and shot everything as much as I could show. Hope you guys will like it. We also went to the Goat farm and drunk the milk of goat. I enjoyed the whole trip thoroughly. 

EPISODE 3: https://youtu.be/tRqfWAYhfhs

TIMELINE:
0:21- Camel Farm
2:15- Slaughtering Camel
4:51- Cooking
13:24- Goat Farm
15:38- Drinking Goat Milk
18:44- Camel Meal
_______________________________

vi.title: Dừng chuyển động ASMR - Bẫy cá sấu vàng dưới lòng đất thí nghiệm dưới bùn Nấu Ăn Bất Thường
vi.description:
Un Cá sấu, Công nghệ Nguyên thủy: Con người tạo Bẫy ASMR Stop Motion. Cách Làm - Thử Nghiệm Nấu Ăn Kỳ Lạ Của Người Nguyên Thủy Vàng Dưới Lòng Đất Bất Thường. Video mới Mỗi ngày HÃY SN SÀNG ... Cảm Ơn Các Bạn Đã Xem Kênh Cuộc Sống Hoang Dã Không thể tin nổi ... thư giãn là tôi! video cuối cùng https://youtu.be/JAWY-8gmlpw. Trong video tiếp theo, chúng tôi sẽ tạo một video thử nghiệm kết hợp hoạt ảnh và dừng chuyển động.
Cảm ơn đã xem! Hãy để lại một lượt thích nếu bạn thích và cho tôi biết suy nghĩ của bạn trong phần bình luận! 👉 Cảnh báo: Đây là hàng không có thật, đừng ăn nhé!
Nếu bạn thích nó, xin vui lòng nhấn nút đăng ký, nhấn chuông 🔔 thông báo và nhớ bình luận cho tôi biết tôi nên làm gì trong video tiếp theo của tôi.
Tất cả các tập phim đều được thực hiện bằng kỹ thuật hoạt hình chuyển động dừng và thuộc sở hữu của VEGA CREATORS CO., LTD.
#asmr #stopmotioncooking #eatingsounds
